perspective.description: The narrative voice or speaker identity through which the song is delivered.
perspective.parsimony_rule: Select 1 primary dominant code. Only select a 2nd code if an equally prominent dual perspective exists.

codes.label: Moral Accuser
codes.definition: Confrontational narrative voice attributing guilt, passing moral judgment, and demanding retribution/accountability.
codes.inclusion: Direct accusations of murder, hypocrisy, or guilt; demanding moral accountability or punishment.

codes.label: Systemic Critic
codes.definition: Narrative voice focusing on structural, institutional, and political systems of oppression (capitalism, consumerism, patriarchy).
codes.inclusion: Critiques of subsidies, consumer culture, corporate greed, and institutionalized exploitation.

codes.label: Ethical Advocate
codes.definition: Voice of conscience, empathy, and moral appeal, advocating for non-human animals through education and compassion.
codes.inclusion: Appeals to empathy, calls for changes in animal treatment, universal compassion, peaceful vegan advocacy.

codes.label: Direct Action Liberator
codes.definition: Activist voice advocating for or documenting direct action, underground resistance, animal rescue, sabotage, and ALF raids.
codes.inclusion: References to breaking cages, burning labs, underground ALF networks, militant resistance.

codes.label: Witness & Observer
codes.definition: Perspective centered on observing and documenting the suffering of others, characterized by shock, grief, or disgust.
codes.inclusion: Descriptions of watching slaughter/atrocities, feeling haunted by witnessed suffering.

codes.label: Captive Animal Voice
codes.definition: First-person narrative voice representing the exploited, caged, or slaughtered animal or victim.
codes.inclusion: First-person accounts of being caged, commodified, processed, or killed.

codes.label: Rebellious Animal
codes.definition: First-person narrative voice of an animal expressing active defiance, resistance, wildness, or retaliation.
codes.inclusion: Animals threatening retaliation, expressing pride in wild nature, organizing animal rebellion.

codes.label: Ecological Warning
codes.definition: Narrative voice delivering urgent warnings of ecological collapse, global extinction, or civilizational doom.
codes.inclusion: Warnings of deforestation, resource wars, extinction, and final ultimatums to humanity.

codes.label: Clinical Observer
codes.definition: Cold, objective, or scientific narrative voice describing exploitation or biological processes with detachment.
codes.inclusion: Scientific descriptions of biology or cold, emotionless descriptions of dissection/slaughter.

codes.label: Personal Storyteller
codes.definition: Narrative voice grounded in everyday personal experiences, lifestyle choices, personal conflicts, or storytelling.
codes.inclusion: Descriptions of eating at restaurants, personal health journeys, parental reflections, casual storytelling.

codes.label: Oppressor Persona
codes.definition: Narrative voice representing the human oppressor or slaughterer justifying or enacting violence and supremacy.
codes.inclusion: First-person expressions of human superiority, right to enslave, or execution of slaughter.

lyrical_tone.description: The rhetorical posture, delivery style, and artistic tone of the lyrics.
lyrical_tone.parsimony_rule: Select 1 primary dominant code. Only select a 2nd code if an equally prominent secondary posture exists.

codes.label: Moral Indictment
codes.definition: Accusatory, righteous posture framing actions as severe moral failures or crimes.

codes.label: Systemic Critique
codes.definition: Tone targeting institutional power, state enforcement, corporate greed, and capitalism.

codes.label: Defiant Resistance
codes.definition: Unyielding, rebellious posture of active resistance and readiness to fight back.

codes.label: Aggressive Vengeance
codes.definition: Hostile, confrontational tone with direct threats, violent imagery, and demands for vengeance.

codes.label: Cynical Weariness
codes.definition: Weary, exhausted, or deeply cynical tone reflecting hopelessness and broken trust.

codes.label: Call to Action
codes.definition: Urgent, rallying tone designed to mobilize listeners to immediate collective action.

codes.label: Apocalyptic Fatalism
codes.definition: Prophetic, doom-laden tone warning of inevitable ecological collapse or cosmic retribution.

codes.label: Satirical & Sarcastic
codes.definition: Sarcastic, mocking, or intellectually superior tone using snark or condescension.

codes.label: Philosophical Advocacy
codes.definition: Educational, rational, or philosophical tone using logical arguments, health facts, or ethics.

codes.label: Introspective Reckoning
codes.definition: Deeply personal, introspective tone focusing on self-guilt, personal sacrifice, or internal struggle.

codes.label: Visceral Lament
codes.definition: Highly emotional, raw, graphic tone expressing deep grief and horror at physical suffering.

codes.label: Clinical Detachment
codes.definition: Cold, objective, sterile tone describing violent or surgical acts with technical precision.

codes.label: Critical Inquiry
codes.definition: Questioning tone challenging assumptions, addressing external skepticism, or doubting narratives.

codes.label: Biological Equivalence
codes.definition: Philosophical tone leveling human and animal biology ('flesh and blood is animal, is you and me').

codes.label: Conflicted Idealism
codes.definition: Self-aware, pragmatic, or hypocritical tone acknowledging the gap between ideals and convenience.

intensity.description: The energy level, emotional extremity, and urgency of the lyrical delivery.
intensity.parsimony_rule: Select 1 primary dominant code. Only select a 2nd code if an equally prominent dual intensity exists.

codes.label: Moral Outrage
codes.definition: Intense ethical condemnation, indignation, and judgment against atrocities.

codes.label: Aggressive Assault
codes.definition: Direct, highly aggressive, profane verbal attacks aimed at adversaries.

codes.label: Defiant Resolve
codes.definition: Expressions of unyielding determination and militant commitment to a cause.

codes.label: Visceral Graphic Horror
codes.definition: Vivid, graphic, emotionally intense depictions of slaughter, decay, and physical dread.

codes.label: Revolutionary Urgency
codes.definition: High-intensity demands for immediate action, revolution, or behavioral change.

codes.label: Apocalyptic Doom
codes.definition: Rhetoric centered on imminent collapse, inevitable retribution, and cosmic doom.

codes.label: Structural Indictment
codes.definition: Analytical yet intense critiques targeting institutionalized oppression and capital.

codes.label: Desperate Plea
codes.definition: Low-to-mid-intensity expressions of acute vulnerability, desperation, and pleading.

codes.label: Jaded Resignation
codes.definition: Subdued, jaded, or clinically detached perspectives on suffering.

codes.label: Violent Vengeance
codes.definition: Extreme explicit threats or celebrations of physical violence against oppressors.

clarity.description: How directly or indirectly animal exploitation, slaughter, or vegan ethics are named.

codes.label: Minor Theme
codes.definition: Complete lack of reference to animal exploitation, slaughter, vivisection, or vegan ethics.

codes.label: Graphic Slaughter
codes.definition: Visceral, detailed, highly graphic descriptions of physical violence and butchery.

codes.label: Explicitly Vegan
codes.definition: Direct, unambiguous naming of 'vegan', 'veganism', 'animal rights', or 'liberation'.

codes.label: Vivisection & Lab Cruelty
codes.definition: Direct naming and depiction of lab testing, vivisection, and scientific experiments.

codes.label: Dietary Accusation
codes.definition: Direct moral confrontation accusing the consumer of complicity in animal death ('meat is murder').

codes.label: Commodification Critique
codes.definition: Critique focused on industrial capitalist systems reducing sentient lives to inventory/products.

codes.label: Plant-Based Advocacy
codes.definition: Listing animal materials/foods to avoid ('no meat, no dairy, no fur') or promoting plant-based diets.

codes.label: Subtle Ethical Critique
codes.definition: Indirect, subtle, or universalized expressions of empathy for all living things.

codes.label: Allegory & Metaphor
codes.definition: Use of metaphor, fable, skinning allegories, or symbolic language.

codes.label: Ambivalent / Carnist View
codes.definition: Lyrics expressing conflict or actively normalizing animal consumption ('pizza with cheese').

focus_amount.description: The degree to which animal liberation/vegan ethics forms the central thesis versus a secondary or minor theme.

codes.label: Central Thesis
codes.definition: The primary, overriding lyrical focus is dedicated to animal rights, anti-exploitation, or veganism.

codes.label: Intersectional Pillar
codes.definition: Animal exploitation is framed as a co-equal, integrated pillar alongside capitalism, patriarchy, or racism.

codes.label: Secondary Mention
codes.definition: Animal suffering is discussed in detail but serves as a secondary theme or specific verse illustration.

codes.label: Peripheral Reference
codes.definition: Brief, passing, or peripheral reference (e.g. single line in a list or lifestyle mention).

codes.label: Minor Focus
codes.definition: Complete absence of references to animal welfare, veganism, or non-human ethics.

codes.label: Insufficient Text
codes.definition: Lacks sufficient lyrical content to perform thematic analysis (instrumental or missing text).

target_audience.description: The specific individuals, groups, institutions, or societal entities addressed or criticized.
target_audience.parsimony_rule: Select 1 primary dominant code. Only select a 2nd code if an equally prominent secondary target exists.

codes.label: Meat & Dairy Consumers
codes.definition: Individuals who actively purchase, consume, or wear animal-derived products.

codes.label: Bystander Public
codes.definition: General public who are aware of cruelty but choose to look away, remain silent, or tolerate injustice.

codes.label: Agribusiness & Industry
codes.definition: Corporate entities, agribusiness, factory farms, slaughterhouses, and capitalist structures.

codes.label: Vivisection Labs
codes.definition: Labs, medical researchers, and pharmaceutical companies performing animal testing.

codes.label: State & Ideology
codes.definition: Governments, legal systems, police, patriarchy, fascism, and oppressive dogmas.

codes.label: Hunters & Abusers
codes.definition: Individuals directly inflicting physical violence, hunting, circuses, or slaughter.

codes.label: Human Society at Large
codes.definition: Broad species-level critique targeting the human race and human superiority.

codes.label: Hypocritical Animal Lovers
codes.definition: Groups claiming high moral standing (pro-lifers, pet owners) while ignoring animal slaughter.

codes.label: Youth & Future Generations
codes.definition: Children, youth, and future generations representing hope or innocent inheritors of crisis.

codes.label: Oppressed Groups
codes.definition: Captive animals, third-world peasants, or marginalized populations targeted as allies.

codes.label: Personal Friend / Self
codes.definition: Specific individuals, the self in the mirror, or personal friends/caregivers.

codes.label: General Audience
codes.definition: No specific target audience explicitly identified or instrumental.

emotions.description: The primary emotional tenor and affective states conveyed by the song as a complete work.
emotions.parsimony_rule: Select 1 to 3 dominant key emotions that best reflect the song's emotional arc.

codes.label: Moral Outrage
codes.definition: Intense anger triggered by perceived violations of ethical boundaries and slaughter.

codes.label: Defiant Resistance
codes.definition: Active, confrontational resistance against oppressive systems, cages, or slaughter.

codes.label: Accusatory Blame
codes.definition: Direct blame calling out consumers/society as murderers, hypocrites, or barbarians.

codes.label: Vengeful Retribution
codes.definition: Desires or threats of physical retaliation and gallows against animal abusers.

codes.label: Visceral Vocal Rage
codes.definition: Raw, explosive, unrefined shouting and vocal fury.

codes.label: Activist Solidarity
codes.definition: Intense loyalty to underground activist fronts (ALF).

codes.label: Sardonic Mockery
codes.definition: Sarcastic, ironic humor exposing meat-eater hypocrisies.

codes.label: Eco Fury
codes.definition: Intense anger directed at industrial destruction of ecosystems and nature.

codes.label: Empathetic Anguish
codes.definition: Deep, agonizing pain felt on behalf of suffering animals.

codes.label: Eco Grief
codes.definition: Mourning extinct species, rainforest loss, and planetary ruin.

codes.label: Mournful Elegy
codes.definition: Poetic, formal laments dedicated to animal victims.

codes.label: Compassionate Sorrow
codes.definition: Tender sadness and pity for captive or abandoned animals.

codes.label: Desolate Loss
codes.definition: Profound, irreversible grief following slaughter or extinction.

codes.label: Universal Kinship
codes.definition: Kinship and equal empathy felt for all living creatures.

codes.label: Graphic Horror
codes.definition: Shock and terror induced by blood, gore, and slaughterhouse mechanics.

codes.label: Meat Disgust
codes.definition: Physical nausea and revulsion at eating animal flesh or corpses.

codes.label: Misanthropy
codes.definition: Revulsion at the human species as a disease or inherently corrupt.

codes.label: Apocalyptic Dread
codes.definition: Terrifying anticipation of planetary collapse or extinction.

codes.label: Captivity Alienation
codes.definition: Claustrophobic terror of being caged, commodified, or tested on.

codes.label: Existential Despair
codes.definition: Profound hopeless void facing global slaughter.

codes.label: Fatalistic Resignation
codes.definition: Passive acceptance of inevitable extinction or human moral failure.

codes.label: Disillusionment
codes.definition: Loss of faith in human morality, corporate promises, and greenwashing.

codes.label: Total Annihilation
codes.definition: Desire for total destruction of human civilization to end suffering.

codes.label: Desperate Yearning
codes.definition: Anguished longing for freedom or relief from pain.

codes.label: Collective Guilt
codes.definition: Shared moral guilt for human complicity in slaughter.

codes.label: Species Shame
codes.definition: Deep embarrassment at belonging to a species that inflicts such cruelty.

codes.label: Self-Scrutiny
codes.definition: Self-reflective questioning leading to a moral awakening.

codes.label: Demand for Apology
codes.definition: Direct demand for immediate moral action and apology to animals.

codes.label: Vegan Hope
codes.definition: Optimistic faith in youth activism and a vegan world.

codes.label: Unbroken Moral Courage
codes.definition: Unyielding, long-term moral courage standing firm against all odds.

codes.label: Empty Cage Joy
codes.definition: Exuberant joy celebrating animal rescues and empty cages.

codes.label: Empowered Education
codes.definition: Confident, active conviction advocating for plant-based nutrition.
